## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` clean
- [ ] `pnpm lint` clean
- [ ] `pnpm verify-all` passes (if logic changed)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected page in dev
- [ ] Schema change? Pushed to BOTH dev + prod Neon
- [ ] Audit-log metadata reviewed for PII leakage (if mutation added)
